description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front FitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or  wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsPay tribute to the fabulous brand wrangler that has been clothing the world since the 1940s, and to North Carolina where the company first set up shop, with this t-shirt. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
